name: Mexican Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 6 cans Diced tomatoes with liquid, 14-1/2 oz each
32 to 40 10-inch flour tortillas, cut into 2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In several Dutch ovens over medium heat, brown the beef and onion; drain.
2. Add the taco seasoning, tomato sauce, and diced tomatoes; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat; cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Spoon about 2 cups of meat mixture into six 13x9 baking pans.
5. Top each with a single layer of tortilla strips.
6. Sprinkle with 1 cup of cheese.
7. Repeat layers 2 more times, ending with the remaining meat sauce (about 7 cups per pan).
8. Top with the remaining tortilla strips and sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
9. Cover and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until bubbly.
10. Uncover; return to the oven for 5 to 10 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
